login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to your Klynt account.

success.title: Account created
success.message: A verification link has been sent to your email.
success.messageWithEmail: A verification link has been sent to {{email}}.

verifyEmail.title: Verifying your email
verifyEmail.subtitle: Please wait while we confirm your verification link.
verifyEmail.success: Email verified successfully. Let's set up your workspace.
verifyEmail.error: Verification failed. Please request a new link.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Klynt
onboarding.subtitle: Create your first workspace or join an existing one with an invite code.

inviteCode.label: Invite code
inviteCode.error: Failed to join workspace. Please check the code and try again.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.success: If an account exists, a reset link has been sent.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
resetPassword.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
resetPassword.success: Password reset successfully. Please log in.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.description: Manage sessions that are currently signed in to your account.
